## Customer Reviews

[See 600+ Sift reviews on G2](https://www.g2.com/products/sift-s-ai-powered-fraud-decisioning-platform-sift/reviews)

![previous-arrow](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![Jasmine](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2096%2096'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Jasmine L.

Risk Investigator

![five-stars-white](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

5/5

"SIFT: The most dependable payment protection tool to detect fraud and avoid unauthorized activities."

As risk investigators, Sift has become an essential part of our assessments. It guides us in decision-making by providing valuable insights such as login activities, locations and devices used, and other online behaviors of customers. The tool is user-friendly and seamlessly integrates with our other systems for conducting checks.

![Kriezl](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

5/5

"Sift : Helpful tool to mitigate Fraud"

What I like best about Sift is how effectively it empowers me in my role as a Risk Investigator. The platform's machine learning models and real-time decisioning allow me to detect and act on suspicious activity quickly and with confidence.

![a professional headshot](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20124%20124'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Arlyn Y.

Risk Investigator

5/5

"Real-Time Fraud Prevention That Protects Good Users—with a Strong Product Mindset"

What I like best about Sift is how it turns a really hard, high-stakes problem—fraud and abuse—into something actionable in real time. The combination of strong machine learning, massive network data, and a clear focus on trust means the work has very tangible impact.

![belle](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2096%2096'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift makes it easy for us to spot and stop fraud in real time, which really helps us make faster, more confident decisions. ![anonymous-avatar-purple](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

We've been using Sift for over 8 years now, and it’s been nothing short of excellent. The platform is reliable, easy to work with, and constantly improves to stay ahead of new fraud trends. It’s a tool we trust and highly recommend to any business serious about fraud protection.

## How Sift Fits Into Your Fraud Strategy

![unified-protection](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Clear control over fraud and revenue

Balance automation with granular control so fraud and risk teams can see exactly why someone was approved or declined. Analysts can adjust thresholds, workflows, and logic without waiting on engineering, improving approval rates and reducing false positives.

![hands-on-fraud-expertise](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Hands-on fraud expertise

Sift is more than a fraud detection tool, giving customers direct access to Trust and Safety Architects and industry experts who have seen similar attacks across hundreds of businesses. Teams move faster and feel supported in high-stakes decisions while upleveling their fraud strategy over time.

![confidence-in-high-risk](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Confidence in high-risk moments

Protect your biggest revenue moments without dialing back automation or overloading manual review. When traffic surges or attacks spike, Sift keeps fraud decisions consistent and predictable so you can capture legitimate revenue with confidence.

![intelligence-beyond](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Intelligence beyond your data

Sift’s global network processes over one trillion events annually, detecting emerging threats early and providing context your own data can’t. New-to-you users are often not new to Sift, so you can recognize known fraud patterns sooner and stop coordinated abuse before it escalates.

![efficiency-that-improves](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Efficiency that improves accuracy

Sift automates routine reviews and surfaces clear risk signals in an intuitive console so analysts spend more time acting and less time second-guessing. This reduces manual effort while improving decision quality, protecting revenue, and increasing customer lifetime value.

![unified-protection](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### End-to-end protection

Connect payments fraud, account defense, and abuse prevention in a single platform with a shared view of user behavior. Protect customers from sign-up through checkout and beyond while reducing tool sprawl and operational complexity.

![sift-leads-g2-winter](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201485%201215'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
